## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeConfectionBase.getEffectiveUrls() method

Gets effective URLs for a specific version (base URLs + version's additional URLs).

**Signature:**

```typescript
getEffectiveUrls(version?: AnyConfectionVersion): ReadonlyArray<ICategorizedUrl>;
```
